title: IR Playbook Engine — Regulatory Notification Timer & Auto-Containment
description: ir_playbook_engine.py has 15 built-in playbooks, automated containment actions (block IP, disable user, isolate host), FIPS-compliant evidence chain, and regulatory notification tracker (GDPR 72h, HIPAA 60d, PCI-DSS). threat_response_engine.py and threat_score_engine.py cluster here. Gap: regulatory timers are stored but not enforced — no background job fires the notification when the deadline approaches.
missing: Regulatory notification scheduler: background thread checks notification deadlines every 15 minutes and fires notification_engine alerts at T-24h, T-4h, T-0

Auto-containment execution: implement real action runners for block_ip (calls firewall_policy_engine), disable_user (calls access_control_engine), isolate_host (calls network_segmentation_engine) instead of logging stubs
Threat score → IR escalation: when threat_score_engine computes risk_level=critical, auto-trigger the matching IR playbook without manual activation
